reason: All 8 delta changes are logically sound. FR-25 happy_path correctly validates that a well-formed CIDR initializes successfully, completing the acceptance criteria coverage. FR-27 fault_injection tests accurately represent NP-07 (embedding API down → tier1 fallback) and NP-15 (timeout threshold exceeded → tsvector fallback) per app.core.knowledge retry/network-client obligation. FR-34 reclassification to state_transition/Q4 is appropriate and consistent with FR-37 treatment — both tests exercise FSM transition semantics directly. FR-40 fault_injection tests correctly model NP-07 (server down → empty tool list, fail-secure) and NP-15 (connection timeout → error result) for MCPAdapter. FR-42 fault_injection tests correctly model NP-15 (process timeout → termination) and NP-07 (process killed externally → false+error), which are the canonical representations of those patterns for a CLI subprocess adapter. FR-69 fault_injection tests correctly model NP-07 (calibration LLM unreachable → cached kappa fallback) and NP-15 (calibration timeout → skip cycle), consistent with the 30s timeout implied by the monthly calibration window. FR-84 title '7 端點' is the correct choice: the test input has always listed 7 distinct URL paths; the SRS '6 個' counts by platform/adapter grouping, not by unique routes, so '7 端點' better serves as the title of a URL-level test section without contradicting the SRS intent. Summary math 130+114+22+4+35+57+70=432 is verified correct; state_transition delta +2 and fault_injection delta +8 are consistent with the per-FR changes described.
citations: SRS FR-25: 非法 CIDR 啟動時即失敗；非法 IP 不拋例外回 False — happy_path test_fr25_valid_cidr_startup_succeeds covers the affirmative initialization path missing in round 1
SAD Step 1b: app.core.knowledge 'Network client + retry (LLM + Embedding)' FORCES NP-07, NP-15 for FR-26–33 — FR-27 now has one test per forced pattern
SAD Step 1b: app.services.aee 'Network client + retry (A2AAdapter, MCPAdapter)' FORCES NP-07, NP-15 for FR-39–45 — FR-40 and FR-42 each now have one test per forced pattern
SAD Step 1b: app.services.llm_judge 'Parallel network calls (2 LLMs)' FORCES NP-07, NP-15 for FR-65–69 — FR-69 now has one test per forced pattern

SRS FR-34: 8-state FSM with ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS enforcement — both valid and invalid transition tests are transition-semantic tests; Q4 derivation is correct; FR-37 precedent confirms the classification
SRS FR-84 description enumerates 7 distinct URL paths across 6 platform/adapter groups; the test input expected_paths lists all 7; title '7 端點' matches the test scope accurately

gaps.message: FR-42 NP-07 modeled as SIGKILL (process killed externally) rather than the more canonical 'process not found / spawn failure' interpretation. SIGKILL is a valid NP-07 proxy for a subprocess adapter but is slightly non-standard; acceptable given CLIAdapter's sandboxed execution context.

FR-84 title change from '6 端點' to '7 端點' diverges from SRS literal wording. The change is defensible (URL count vs. adapter count) but a comment in TEST_SPEC.md explaining the discrepancy would eliminate future ambiguity.
